truth.text: {{current_nickname}}, what's a childhood memory that still makes you smile when you think about it?
{{current_nickname}}, what did your parents' relationship teach you, good or bad, about love?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you were really proud of before you met {{other_nickname}} that you don't think they know about?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a value or belief you got from your upbringing that you've kept as an adult?
{{current_nickname}}, what did you imagine your life would look like at this age when you were a kid?
{{current_nickname}}, who was your biggest role model growing up, and why?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you believe about the world that most people around you don't seem to share?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a small, everyday thing that makes you feel genuinely loved?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a place you've been to that genuinely changed how you see the world?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the most important lesson a failure ever taught you?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you do differently from how you were raised, intentionally?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a compliment you received that you still think about?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you're quietly proud of that you'd never bring up yourself?
{{current_nickname}}, what kind of old person do you want to be?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a book, film, or song that genuinely shaped who you are?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you used to be embarrassed about that you've made peace with?
{{current_nickname}}, what does a perfect ordinary day look like to you?

dare.text: {{current_nickname}}, tell {{other_nickname}} one thing you've never said out loud that you admire about {{other_nickname}}.
{{current_nickname}}, describe {{other_nickname}} using only food metaphors for 15 seconds.
{{current_nickname}}, tell {{other_nickname}} what you were thinking about during your first kiss.

truth.text: {{current_nickname}}, what's the biggest mistake you've made in a past relationship, and what did it teach you?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something about your personality you actively work on improving?
{{current_nickname}}, what does emotional safety mean to you, and have you ever truly felt it with someone?
{{current_nickname}}, is there a version of yourself you've left behind that you sometimes grieve?
{{current_nickname}}, what's your biggest fear when it comes to long-term commitment?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you've never told your family about yourself?
{{current_nickname}}, have you ever stayed in a situation — friendship, job, relationship — way longer than you should have? Why?
{{current_nickname}}, what's your relationship with your own ambition — does it drive you, scare you, or both?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a belief about yourself that you're not sure is even true anymore?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a period of your life you don't talk about much — and why?
{{current_nickname}}, is there a friendship you lost that you still think about?
{{current_nickname}}, what does 'home' mean to you — is it a place, a feeling, a person?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you've sacrificed for someone else that you've never fully made peace with?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you find genuinely hard to forgive in people?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the most afraid you've ever been, and how did you handle it?
{{current_nickname}}, is there a version of your life you almost lived that you think about sometimes?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you need when you're at your lowest that you struggle to ask for?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a boundary you have that you've let people cross more than once?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the harshest thing someone has said to you that stuck?
{{current_nickname}}, when do you feel most like yourself?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something about your past you've reframed over time — something that hurt then but you've found meaning in since?
{{current_nickname}}, is there something you've outgrown that used to define you?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a lie you used to tell yourself that you no longer believe?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the most generous thing anyone has ever done for you?
{{current_nickname}}, what part of growing up was hardest for you that you rarely talk about?

dare.text: {{current_nickname}}, hold {{other_nickname}}'s face in your hands and maintain eye contact for 15 seconds without laughing.
{{current_nickname}}, give {{other_nickname}} a forehead kiss and whisper something they need to hear.
{{current_nickname}}, trace a letter on {{other_nickname}}'s back with your finger — they have to guess what you wrote.
{{current_nickname}}, slow dance with {{other_nickname}} for one full song, no talking.
{{current_nickname}}, give {{other_nickname}} a hand massage for 15 seconds.

truth.text: {{current_nickname}}, what's something that happened in your past that you think still quietly affects you today?
{{current_nickname}}, have you ever been truly heartbroken? What did it change about you?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a dealbreaker you have that you'd feel uncomfortable admitting out loud?
{{current_nickname}}, is there anything about your past, a choice, a period of life, a version of you, that you feel ashamed of?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you want from life that you're afraid to tell {{other_nickname}} in case they don't want the same thing?
{{current_nickname}}, have you ever fallen out of love with someone? What did that feel like?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a part of yourself you've hidden in past relationships to avoid conflict or rejection?
{{current_nickname}}, is there something you've always wanted to ask {{other_nickname}} but held back from?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the most vulnerable you've ever let yourself be with another person, and how did it go?
{{current_nickname}}, what does your gut tell you about you and {{other_nickname}} — honestly, right now?
{{current_nickname}}, if you knew {{other_nickname}} wouldn't judge you, what's something you'd tell them that you haven't yet?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the biggest way you've changed as a person in the last five years — and are you happy about it?
{{current_nickname}}, have you ever loved someone you knew wasn't right for you? What kept you there?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you want your relationship with {{other_nickname}} to give you that your life is currently missing?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you've done that you'd struggle to defend, even now?
{{current_nickname}}, have you ever pushed someone away who genuinely cared about you? Why?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the closest you've ever come to completely losing yourself?
{{current_nickname}}, is there a person from your past you think about more than you probably should?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something about {{other_nickname}} that surprised you — that didn't match who you expected them to be?
{{current_nickname}}, have you ever resented someone you loved? What did that feel like?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the most dishonest you've ever been in a relationship, and why?
{{current_nickname}}, what's a fear about yourself that you don't say out loud?
{{current_nickname}}, what's something you want more of in your relationship with {{other_nickname}} that you haven't said yet?
{{current_nickname}}, if you could go back and handle one moment in your life completely differently, what would it be?
{{current_nickname}}, what's the loneliest you've ever felt, and what caused it?
{{current_nickname}}, is there a part of your inner world, thoughts, feelings, a whole side of you, that you don't think anyone has ever fully seen?

dare.text: {{current_nickname}}, give {{other_nickname}} a slow kiss that starts on their neck and ends at their jaw.
{{current_nickname}}, whisper exactly what you want to do to {{other_nickname}} — nothing omitted.
{{current_nickname}}, sit in {{other_nickname}}'s lap and kiss them for 15 seconds.
